conflict_success.query: When did freeze dried candy see a major surge in popularity?

selected_evidence.title: Freeze drying
selected_evidence.text: In 2020, freeze dried candy saw a major surge in popularity due to viral popularity on social media with freeze dried versions of popular candies such as skittles, nerd clusters, and sweet tarts appearing in stores.
